name: General Business Credit Carryback and Carryforward

eligibility.description: Available to any business with general business credits (Section 38) that exceed the annual tax liability limitation.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows taxpayers to carry unused general business credits back 1 year to offset past tax liability for a refund, and forward up to 20 years to offset future liability.
